caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red and gold bowtie, tan suspenders, and glasses. He wears a large, gray, peaked wig and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a microphone, and a logo on the screen reads "THE TALK PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY". The background consists of a white wall adorned with several framed photographs and some clothing items. As the sequence progresses, the man is initially speaking and gesturing with his hand. He then lifts his hand to adjust his wig, touching the side of his head. Finally, he lowers his hand and continues to speak while looking slightly off-camera. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, highlighting the various textures of his costume and the studio decor.
